title: EaseonCS - SilentSign
description: Silently places signs without opening the sign edit screen.
body:
# 🌿 EaseonCS - SilentSign **Minecraft:** `1.21.10` **Loader:** `Fabric` **Side:** `Client-Side` **This mod requires EaseonCS-Core** ## Overview A lightweight client-side mod that prevents the sign edit screen from opening after placing a sign. Perfect for builders and redstoners who want to place signs quickly without interruption.
Preview ![SilentSign Demo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8KncB0wP/images/63bb3801b6cabb6cbd28b420164e5f63edb80daf.webp)

--- ### 🔗 More Easeon Mods Looking for more lightweight and practical mods in the same style? Check out other Easeon series mods here.
